markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Intro call to explore a marketing partnership between Knox and GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/7YFEN2WXfo53w4XzaQSAsWbZoTYgRKf9?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**The Problem:** Knox, a FedRAMP acceleration service, has zero AI search visibility, being omitted from vendor lists that include smaller, less credible competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/7YFEN2WXfo53w4XzaQSAsWbZoTYgRKf9?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [**The Solution:** GrowthX will build a content engine to establish Knox as the definitive FedRAMP authority, using AI search and programmatic content (e.g., a contract finder) to drive traffic and leads.](https://fathom.video/share/7YFEN2WXfo53w4XzaQSAsWbZoTYgRKf9?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [**The Decision:** Knox CEO Irina Denisenko is ready to start immediately, citing a strong referral from Francois and a clear need for an expert partner.](https://fathom.video/share/7YFEN2WXfo53w4XzaQSAsWbZoTYgRKf9?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)
  - [**The Plan:** A strategy call with GrowthX founder Marcel is set for Feb 4 at 7:30 AM EST. A contract will be sent in parallel, targeting a Feb 23 kickoff.](https://fathom.video/share/7YFEN2WXfo53w4XzaQSAsWbZoTYgRKf9?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Zero AI Search Visibility

  - [Knox's core service: Accelerating FedRAMP authorization (90 days, 90% less cost) for SaaS companies targeting the federal government.](https://fathom.video/share/7YFEN2WXfo53w4XzaQSAsWbZoTYgRKf9?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [**Goal:** Become synonymous with FedRAMP.](https://fathom.video/share/7YFEN2WXfo53w4XzaQSAsWbZoTYgRKf9?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [**Challenge:** Zero AI search visibility. A live ChatGPT demo showed Knox was completely omitted from vendor lists for the query "how do I get ramped."](https://fathom.video/share/7YFEN2WXfo53w4XzaQSAsWbZoTYgRKf9?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [**Opportunity:** The competitive landscape is weak. The primary competitor, Palantir, is not focused on this business group, leaving a wide-open field for Knox to dominate.](https://fathom.video/share/7YFEN2WXfo53w4XzaQSAsWbZoTYgRKf9?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)

### The Solution: A Two-Part Content Engine

  - [**Part 1: Foundational Content**](https://fathom.video/share/7YFEN2WXfo53w4XzaQSAsWbZoTYgRKf9?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
      - [Build authority with editorial content on FedRAMP processes and benefits.](https://fathom.video/share/7YFEN2WXfo53w4XzaQSAsWbZoTYgRKf9?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
      - [Focus on the core audience: CEOs, CROs, and Heads of Federal at SaaS companies ($50M–$1B revenue).](https://fathom.video/share/7YFEN2WXfo53w4XzaQSAsWbZoTYgRKf9?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
  - [**Part 2: Programmatic Tools**](https://fathom.video/share/7YFEN2WXfo53w4XzaQSAsWbZoTYgRKf9?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
      - [Create a tool to simplify finding government RFPs, a process that currently costs clients \~$30k via capture firms.](https://fathom.video/share/7YFEN2WXfo53w4XzaQSAsWbZoTYgRKf9?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
      - [**Concept:** A search widget that pulls relevant contracts from public data (e.g., SAM.gov, USAspending.gov).](https://fathom.video/share/7YFEN2WXfo53w4XzaQSAsWbZoTYgRKf9?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This high-value tool would drive significant traffic and establish Knox as an indispensable partner for winning government business.](https://fathom.video/share/7YFEN2WXfo53w4XzaQSAsWbZoTYgRKf9?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)

### The Partnership: GrowthX's AI Search Engine

  - [GrowthX uses AI to accelerate content creation and achieve rapid search visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/7YFEN2WXfo53w4XzaQSAsWbZoTYgRKf9?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/7YFEN2WXfo53w4XzaQSAsWbZoTYgRKf9?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
    1.  [**Contextual Artifacts:** Define brand voice and audience for AI workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/7YFEN2WXfo53w4XzaQSAsWbZoTYgRKf9?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
    2.  [**Strategy:** Analyze keywords and competitor content to find "easy wins" and build authority via topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/7YFEN2WXfo53w4XzaQSAsWbZoTYgRKf9?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
    3.  [**Execution:** Publish 5 articles per week, including programmatic content like directories and tools.](https://fathom.video/share/7YFEN2WXfo53w4XzaQSAsWbZoTYgRKf9?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Proof Points:**](https://fathom.video/share/7YFEN2WXfo53w4XzaQSAsWbZoTYgRKf9?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
      - [**Augment Code:** Achieved near-GitHub visibility for key prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/7YFEN2WXfo53w4XzaQSAsWbZoTYgRKf9?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
      - [**Ramp:** Built a vendor directory using internal spend data.](https://fathom.video/share/7YFEN2WXfo53w4XzaQSAsWbZoTYgRKf9?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
      - **Marcel (Founder):** Drove $17M revenue on \<$1M spend at IBM.

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler (GrowthX):** Send contract to Irina.](https://fathom.video/share/7YFEN2WXfo53w4XzaQSAsWbZoTYgRKf9?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
  - [**Irina (Knox):** Review contract and prepare redlines.](https://fathom.video/share/7YFEN2WXfo53w4XzaQSAsWbZoTYgRKf9?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
  - [**Both:** Meet with GrowthX founder Marcel on Feb 4 at 7:30 AM EST to finalize strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/7YFEN2WXfo53w4XzaQSAsWbZoTYgRKf9?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
  - [**Timeline:** Target a Feb 23 kickoff, contingent on contract signing by Feb 11.](https://fathom.video/share/7YFEN2WXfo53w4XzaQSAsWbZoTYgRKf9?tab=summary&timestamp=1790.0)
      - [**Note:** A March 10 funding announcement press release is too soon for new content to rank, as publishing typically starts in week 4.](https://fathom.video/share/7YFEN2WXfo53w4XzaQSAsWbZoTYgRKf9?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)
